statement.en: On Efficient Approximate Aggregate Nearest Neighbor Queries over Learned Representations

proposer: Wang, Carrie, Amer-Yahia, Sihem, Lakshmanan, Laks et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The axiom describes a technical method (approximate aggregate nearest neighbor queries over learned representations) that is currently under active research and validation. As a 2026 preprint, it represents provisional computational findings not yet consolidated into established theorem or refuted claim. The approach itself is theoretically sound but empirically contingent on dataset, model architecture, and approximation parameters.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 学習された表現空間では、近傍への距離が指数的勾配に消える — 効率とは忘却である。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 同心円上の学習が光を中心へと屈折させ、高次元の迷路から次元の実が浮かぶ。
